Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emperor (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Emperor compensated Ulrich Fletcher for his lost business.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The client is the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor signed the release for Baldezar Kern to take the field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is the ruler of the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is described as the original Heartlander and the father of every bloodline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor has a scar running down his forehead to his nose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The Emperor gave permission for the alchemists' treatments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor can Awaken gravel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor wears a silver chain around his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Emperor is the mysterious client of the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Meia has had sparring matches with the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — The Emperor requires Shera's service.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — The blades are intended for service to the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The Emperor's death led to a desire for anarchy in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor tells Meia she has the strength of a Pilgrim.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor is the father of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor has living memories of the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor killed Nakothi by driving a spear into her heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor can sense the memories and potential in objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor has lived for more than a thousand years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor is the symbol of Imperial stability and civilization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor can bind himself to the heart of a Great Elder without going mad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor tells horror stories about the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor has laid a hand on Shera's knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — The Emperor prepared Shera to deal with Nakothi's tricks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor wears white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor is the Aurelian Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor claimed he could remake and reforge them to give them rebirth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Emperor's personal chambers were torn to pieces and spattered with human and inhuman blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor of the Aurelian Empire emits an aura of madness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor uses an invested pillow to put people to sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor's swords are ancient and invested with Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor broke Lucan's legs by stomping on them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor has performed feats like jumping from a hundred feet and dissolving a teacup with his will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor relies on the power of his invested blades during combat with Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor believes the subject's disposition is unsuitable for a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor states the subject is empathetic, clear-headed, has a strong moral compass, and questions everything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — The Emperor put the former Watchman to sleep and left him there.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The Emperor was murdered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor believes no sacrifice is too great to prevent the rise of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor has indicated his centuries-long life is coming to an end.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor is a person who has explored the possibilities of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor is a character who has lived for almost two millennia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor once sealed the Great Elder Ach’magut in an ancient library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor's title is Your Imperial Highness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is considered safe even if a hostile army were to appear on top of him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is a target of Lucan's squad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is wearing layers of silk in every shade of blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor cannot use the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor can no longer protect his people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor took a name for himself after escaping the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — The Emperor has the ability to bring inanimate objects to life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — The Emperor has been training the Gardeners personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — The Emperor once went insane in the belly of the dead island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor's goal is to serve the Empire and the entire world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor's words carry such Intent that it is impossible to ignore.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor has outlived everyone else in the history of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Emperor is under threat of Elder possession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Emperor has the power to drag whomever they like.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor attempted to build particularly large or intricate Optasias in the past.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor's rooms are seen rarely by Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor wears a simple, single-layered white robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor's real throne is a skeletal metal frame located behind a weapons rack in his rooms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor instructs Shera to execute him if he is not in control of himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor was lounging in his cage-like throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor can use Intent to halt an Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor was once a slave to the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor has changed from what Ach'magut predicted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor uses forceful Intent to destroy things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor corrected Elder-related problems from his throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor is praised by Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor's eye sees all.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor can flex his Intent to cause sources of flame to flare to life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor produced hazy bubbles in the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor once dragged a massive shark out of the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor's active Reading would have torn Shera to pieces if he were at full power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor was killed by Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Emperor is a figure who would be unable to follow the group through the mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor is weakening and requires more personal attention for tasks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — There is a baby Emperor that needs to be finished.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Shera killed the Emperor for the Independent cause.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor was once called Liberator by the people he saved.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor is currently injured with a possible cracked rib, minor cuts, bruises, and a broken foot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor claims to be the Emperor now.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Calder is armed with weapons belonging to the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor has old clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor of humanity was killed by a knife-thrust and sawing motion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor was killed half a year ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor borrowed power from Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Emperor was the moral compass for the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The real Emperor let himself die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Architects would move up the Emperor's timeline in service to him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Emperor's death left the world to make its own decisions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Emperor has already made a decision regarding who rules the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Emperor knows the Regents and the Guild Heads personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — The Emperor can hide Intent from Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor wears armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor's helmet was struck by Bastion's blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor enhanced Shera and Lucan with personal attention.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Yala was first contacted by the Emperor more than two years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor is a historical figure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli honed her talent under the Emperor’s tutelage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor has carried a Great Elder’s heart for almost two thousand years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — The position of Emperor was previously held by only one person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — The Emperor is a figure Shera is used to being in the presence of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor is potentially related to the strength of urges in Shera's shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor stated that before the Elders, all men are allies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor taught Shera precautionary tales about those who dealt with Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Emperor told Shera she needed to be ruthless.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
